# `ConfigFound`

Successful config discovery — file found and parsed.

- Import: `@kjanat/dreamcli`
- Export kind: interface
- Declared in: `src/core/config/index.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/config/index.ts:77`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/config/index.ts#L77)

## Signatures

```ts
interface ConfigFound {}
```

## Members

### Properties

#### `data`

Parsed config data.

```ts
data: Readonly<Record<string, unknown>>;
```

#### `format`

File extension that determined the loader (e.g. `'json'`).

```ts
format: string;
```

#### `found`

Discriminant — `true` indicates a config file was found and parsed successfully.

```ts
found: 'true';
```

#### `path`

Absolute path to the config file that was loaded.

```ts
path: string;
```
